rationale: This file defines the canonical Open WebUI model entry for Nemotron Ultra. It is imported via Admin > Models > Import or applied through the Open WebUI API. Every field maps to a real Open WebUI model object property.
name: AI-OS · Nemotron Ultra

meta.description: Production runtime intelligence layer for NVIDIA Nemotron-3-Ultra-550B-A55B. Optimised for reasoning, architecture, coding, and long-context discussion.

connection.note: Set NVIDIA_API_KEY as an environment variable or Open WebUI secret. Never hard-code.
